title: Plan export — fix arrow and surveyed-by positioning
description:
Inspection direction arrows and Surveyed By labels on structure-node plan downloads looked correct but were offset from the highlight lines. The decor PNG overlay was built in display-pixel space and stretched into PDF coordinates using a single page model, while highlight lines were mapped per-line through the full FitH letterbox transform.

Decor is now rasterized in PDF user space using the same per-line coordinate mapping as line burn, so arrows and labels land on the lines they belong to.

Who is affected: PipeSync users exporting Highlights with Structure Nodes on pipeshare.live and private OVH.
changeLog: Export decor overlay uses per-line page model (same as highlight line burn).
Arrows and surveyed-by labels rasterized in PDF coordinate space, not display stretch.
Full-page PNG embed at 1:1 PDF dimensions — no letterbox rect skew.
